summary: Set 035 Session 4 of 4 — FINAL session: full test sweep, change-log aggregation, version bumps, Round A verification, and Marketplace 0.18.1 publish. Set 035 closes with the H2 single-source-of-truth verdict (Set 033 S2) extended from the orchestrator block to the cancellation/restoration lifecycle. (1) Test sweep: pytest 643 pass + 1 skipped (3:35); tsc --noEmit clean; npm run test:unit 462 pass + 2 pre-existing unrelated failures unchanged (configEditor ViewColumn.One stub gap; notificationsSection 'wired in Set 026 Session 7' assertion); npm run test:playwright 14 pass + 3 pre-existing failures (session-sets-tree.spec.ts ARIA tree / orchestrator block sublabel / empty-state CTA fallback) + 3 skipped. The 3 Layer-3 failures are test-scaffolding / locator-specificity issues, NOT production regressions — verified by inspecting OrchestratorAccordion.ts:340-352 (renderAccordionEmpty still emits .acc-empty-cta with 'No signal — ' prefix). Deferred to Set 034 styling iteration per spec out-of-scope clause. (2) change-log.md authored per [[project_final_session_changelog_pre_close]] (must pre-exist before close_session gate check_change_log_fresh fires): header + Context + one section per Session 1-4 with Shipped + Verification + cumulative cost + 'What ships across the framework' + 'Risks closed' + 'Follow-ups out of scope' (3 Layer-3 deferrals + C1 Python CLI cancellation-reader follow-on + cross-writer golden-file fixtures + explicit SUPERSEDED.md non-introduction). (3) Version bumps: tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/package.json 0.18.0 → 0.18.1; tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/CHANGELOG.md new [0.18.1] section above [0.18.0] heading; CLAUDE.md 'Current: v0.18.1' replacing v0.18.0 + Extension versioning walk extended. pyproject.toml + ai_router/CHANGELOG.md NOT touched — no PyPI release this set (ai_router/session_lifecycle.py last edited 2026-05-01 in Set 010 rename; writer-parity check in Session 2 verified the Python mirror is byte-equivalent with the TS writer, so no edits were needed). (4) Round A verification via gemini-pro (gemini-2.5-pro tier 2): VERIFIED, no must-fix issues, $0.01415125 (11,249 input + 9 output tokens, 28,676-char bundle). Cumulative routed Set 035 spend: $0.0754 of $0.50 forecast (well under). (5) Marketplace publish DarndestDabbler.dabbler-ai-orchestration v0.18.1 LIVE at https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=DarndestDabbler.dabbler-ai-orchestration. First publish attempt with `npx vsce publish --pat $env:AZURE_VSCODE_MARKETPLACE_TOKEN` failed with TF400813 (the bash subprocess didn't inherit the User-scoped env var); operator supplied the PAT inline, retry succeeded. Update reference_vsce_pat.md memory with the User-env-scope caveat post-close. Packaged .vsix included 28 KB of test-results/ diagnostic outputs from the failed Layer-3 scenarios — minor .vscodeignore gap, queue for Set 034 or follow-on hot-fix. Set 035 follow-ups documented in change-log.md: 3 Layer-3 test-scaffolding failures → Set 034; C1 Python CLI print_session_set_status cancellation-reader migration at ai_router/__init__.py:935 → follow-on patch release.
